SEARCH
Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Class Configuration

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.Configuration
public final class Configuration extends Object
Determines the behavior of a validator.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Configuration
    DEFAULT
    The default configuration.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Configuration()
    Creates a new configuration that: Has an empty context. Throws an exception on failure. Uses Object.equals(Object) to determine whether two objects are equal. Excludes this library from exception stack traces. Constructs exceptions lazily. May include a diff that compares the actual and expected values.
    Configuration(boolean cleanStackTrace, boolean includeDiff, EqualityMethod equalityMethod, StringMappers stringMappers, boolean lazyExceptions, boolean throwOnFailure, Function<Throwable,? extends Throwable> exceptionTransformer)
    Creates a new configuration.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    cleanStackTrace()
    Returns true if this library should be excluded from exception stack traces, except when that also removes user code.
    EqualityMethod
    equalityMethod()
    Returns the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent.
    Function<Throwable,? extends Throwable>
    exceptionTransformer()
    Returns a function that transforms the validation exception into a suitable runtime exception or error.
    boolean
    includeDiff()
    Returns true if exception messages should include a diff that compares actual and expected values if they are too long.
    boolean
    lazyExceptions()
    Returns true if exception creation may be deferred until the user invokes Validator.elseGetException().
    StringMappers
    stringMappers()
    Returns the configuration used to map contextual values to a String.
    boolean
    throwOnFailure()
    Returns true if an exception is thrown on validation failure.

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT

      public static final Configuration DEFAULT
      The default configuration.

  • Constructor Details

    • Configuration

      public Configuration()
      Creates a new configuration that:
      • Has an empty context.
      • Throws an exception on failure.
      • Uses Object.equals(Object) to determine whether two objects are equal.
      • Excludes this library from exception stack traces.
      • Constructs exceptions lazily.
      • May include a diff that compares the actual and expected values.

    • Configuration

      public Configuration(boolean cleanStackTrace, boolean includeDiff, EqualityMethod equalityMethod, StringMappers stringMappers, boolean lazyExceptions, boolean throwOnFailure, Function<Throwable,? extends Throwable> exceptionTransformer)
      Creates a new configuration.
      Parameters:
      cleanStackTrace - true if stack traces may be modified, false otherwise
      includeDiff - true if exception messages may include a diff that compares actual and expected values if they are too long
      equalityMethod - the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent
      stringMappers - the configuration used to map contextual values to a String
      lazyExceptions - true if exception creation may be deferred until the user invokes Validator.elseGetException(). The exception matches the original failure, but the stack trace points to elseGetException() as the cause.
      throwOnFailure - true if an exception is thrown on validation failure.
      exceptionTransformer - a function that transforms the validation exception into a suitable runtime exception or error
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any of the arguments are null

  • Method Details

    • cleanStackTrace

      public boolean cleanStackTrace()
      Returns true if this library should be excluded from exception stack traces, except when that also removes user code.
      Returns:
      true by default

    • includeDiff

      public boolean includeDiff()
      Returns true if exception messages should include a diff that compares actual and expected values if they are too long. The threshold for "too long" is not specified.
      Returns:
      true by default

    • equalityMethod

      public EqualityMethod equalityMethod()
      Returns the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent.
      Returns:
      the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent

    • stringMappers

      public StringMappers stringMappers()
      Returns the configuration used to map contextual values to a String. Supports common types such as arrays, numbers, collections, maps, paths and exceptions.
      Returns:
      a function that takes an object and returns the String representation of the object

    • lazyExceptions

      public boolean lazyExceptions()
      Returns true if exception creation may be deferred until the user invokes Validator.elseGetException(). The exception matches the original failure, but the stack trace points to elseGetException() as the cause. By deferring the exception creation, you can improve the performance if only need a list of failure messages instead of a full exception.
      Returns:
      true if exceptions may be created on demand instead of when a validation failure occurs

    • throwOnFailure

      public boolean throwOnFailure()
      Returns true if an exception is thrown on validation failure.
      Returns:
      true if an exception is thrown on validation failure

    • exceptionTransformer

      public Function<Throwable,? extends Throwable> exceptionTransformer()
      Returns a function that transforms the validation exception into a suitable runtime exception or error. The input and output of the function must be subclasses of RuntimeException or Error. If the output is not, it is wrapped in a WrappedCheckedException. If the function returns null the input exception will be thrown.
      Returns:
      a function that transforms the validation exception
